name: 3pc Steel Rust Resistant Outdoor Patio Bistro Set with Cushions Dark Brown - Room Essentials™: Steel Frame, Tempered Glass Table
description:
This 3-Piece Wicker Bistro Set with Cushions from Room Essentials™ is ideal for an impromptu dinner under the stars or working from home on your patio. This all-weather bistro set comes with a square table and two armchairs with wicker seats and backrests. Plus, it comes with two chair cushions for extra comfort. The compact outdoor set is made from steel, and the table has a tempered glass top for modern style.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
